title: Witch Hunt
notes: Requires Steam launch option "PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%" to run. Game is playable but loading/introduction screen is black, if you just wait for the game to load and then click left mouse button you get into the game. Game is still in early access, but have not experienced this problem in Windows.
Everything works out of the box, the text that was missing on previous Proton versions is now displayed properly.
